name: EventRow
description: Calendar event row. Three columns: time (56px, tabular nums) / colour bar (3px) / details. Background is the bar colour at 6% opacity, stroke at 20%. The same pattern is reused for the Tagesübersicht, the in-session event card, and the review screen.

rsvpMapping.comment: Server RSVP status → variant. Fall back to subdued if missing.

platformNotes.swiftui: HStack(time, bar, body). barColor.opacity(0.06) for fill, .opacity(0.20) for stroke. EventRow used in DayOverview and Walkthrough.
